sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98678" key="sumpeta/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπετάννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n98678.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spread out with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:37:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
